concerns.text: Edge Cases states 'minimum 30 images required for analysis' but User Story 1 Acceptance Scenario 1 only demonstrates 5 baseline images. This creates ambiguity: is 5 the test case or the actual minimum? The spec should clarify that 5 is a test sample while 30+ is the production requirement.

FR-004 states 'false details (present only in enhanced/reduced versions)' which contradicts the false memory paradigm. False details should be items that NEVER appeared in any version (the 'lure' items). The parenthetical should read '(items that never appeared in baseline or manipulated versions)' to match US-2's '10 false' questions.

SC-002 states '≥50 per condition' which is terminology for between-subjects designs. Since US-3 and FR-005 specify repeated-measures ANOVA (same participants across all conditions), this phrasing is confusing. Consider '≥50 complete sessions' instead.
